mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_project) AS project_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_project WHERE project_status = 'PLANNING') AS project_planning, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_project WHERE project_status = 'IN_PROGRESS') AS project_in_progress, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_project WHERE project_status = 'DONE') AS project_done, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_task) AS task_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_task WHERE task_status = 'TODO') AS task_todo, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_task WHERE task_status = 'IN_PROGRESS') AS task_in_progress, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_task WHERE task_status = 'DONE') AS task_done, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_task WHERE due_date < CURRENT_DATE AND task_status <> 'DONE') AS overdue_task_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_milestone WHERE due_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + 30) AS upcoming_milestone_count
